NKJV.1: The LORD reigns; Let the earth rejoice; Let the multitude of isles be glad!
NKJV.2: Clouds and darkness surround Him; Righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
NKJV.3: A fire goes before Him, And burns up His enemies round about.
NKJV.4: His lightnings light the world; The earth sees and trembles.
NKJV.5: The mountains melt like wax at the presence of the LORD, At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
NKJV.6: The heavens declare His righteousness, And all the peoples see His glory.
NKJV.7: Let all be put to shame who serve carved images, Who boast of idols. Worship Him, all you gods.
NKJV.8: Zion hears and is glad, And the daughters of Judah rejoice Because of Your judgments, O LORD.
NKJV.9: For You, LORD, are most high above all the earth; You are exalted far above all gods.
NKJV.10: You who love the LORD, hate evil!  He preserves the souls of His saints;  He delivers them out of the hand of the wicked.
NKJV.11: Light is sown for the righteous, And gladness for the upright in heart.
NKJV.12: Rejoice in the LORD, you righteous,  And give thanks at the remembrance of His holy name.

ESV.1: The LORD reigns, let the earth rejoice; let the many coastlands be glad!
ESV.2: Clouds and thick darkness are all around him; righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
ESV.3: Fire goes before him and burns up his adversaries all around.
ESV.4: His lightnings light up the world; the earth sees and trembles.
ESV.5: The mountains melt like wax before the LORD, before the Lord of all the earth.
ESV.6: The heavens proclaim his righteousness, and all the peoples see his glory.
ESV.7: All worshipers of images are put to shame, who make their boast in worthless idols; worship him, all you gods!
ESV.8: Zion hears and is glad, and the daughters of Judah rejoice, because of your judgments, O LORD.
ESV.9: For you, O LORD, are most high over all the earth; you are exalted far above all gods.
ESV.10: O you who love the LORD, hate evil! He preserves the lives of his saints; he delivers them from the hand of the wicked.
ESV.11: Light is sown  for the righteous, and joy for the upright in heart.
ESV.12: Rejoice in the LORD, O you righteous, and give thanks to his holy name!

NASB.1: The LORD reigns, let the earth rejoice; Let the many islands be glad.
NASB.2: Clouds and thick darkness surround Him; Righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
NASB.3: Fire goes before Him And burns up His adversaries round about.
NASB.4: His lightnings lit up the world; The earth saw and trembled.
NASB.5: The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the LORD, At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
NASB.6: The heavens declare His righteousness, And all the peoples have seen His glory.
NASB.7: Let all those be ashamed who serve graven images, Who boast themselves of idols; Worship Him, all you gods.
NASB.8: Zion heard [this] and was glad, And the daughters of Judah have rejoiced Because of Your judgments, O LORD.
NASB.9: For You are the LORD Most High over all the earth; You are exalted far above all gods.
NASB.10: Hate evil, you who love the LORD, Who preserves the souls of His godly ones; He delivers them from the hand of the wicked.
NASB.11: Light is sown [like seed] for the righteous And gladness for the upright in heart.
NASB.12: Be glad in the LORD, you righteous ones, And give thanks to His holy name.

NLT.1:
The LORD is king!
Let the earth rejoice!
Let the farthest coastlands be glad.
NLT.2:
Dark clouds surround him.
Righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
NLT.3:
Fire spreads ahead of him
and burns up all his foes.
NLT.4:
His lightning flashes out across the world.
The earth sees and trembles.
NLT.5:
The mountains melt like wax before the LORD,
before the Lord of all the earth.
NLT.6:
The heavens proclaim his righteousness;
every nation sees his glory.
NLT.7:
Those who worship idols are disgraced —
all who brag about their worthless gods —
for every god must bow to him.
NLT.8:
Jerusalem has heard and rejoiced,
and all the towns of Judah are glad
because of your justice, O LORD!
NLT.9:
For you, O LORD, are supreme over all the earth;
you are exalted far above all gods.
NLT.10:
You who love the LORD, hate evil!
He protects the lives of his godly people
and rescues them from the power of the wicked.
NLT.11:
Light shines on the godly,
and joy on those whose hearts are right.
NLT.12:
May all who are godly rejoice in the LORD
and praise his holy name!

WEB.1: Yahweh reigns! Let the earth rejoice! Let the multitude of islands be glad!
WEB.2: Clouds and darkness are around him. Righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
WEB.3: A fire goes before him, and burns up his adversaries on every side.
WEB.4: His lightning lights up the world. The earth sees, and trembles.
WEB.5: The mountains melt like wax at the presence of Yahweh, at the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
WEB.6: The heavens declare his righteousness. All the peoples have seen his glory.
WEB.7: Let all them be shamed who serve engraved images, who boast in their idols. Worship him, all you gods!
WEB.8: Zion heard and was glad. The daughters of Judah rejoiced, because of your judgments, Yahweh.
WEB.9: For you, Yahweh, are most high above all the earth. You are exalted far above all gods.
WEB.10: You who love Yahweh, hate evil. He preserves the souls of his saints. He delivers them out of the hand of the wicked.
WEB.11: Light is sown for the righteous, and gladness for the upright in heart.
WEB.12: Be glad in Yahweh, you righteous people! Give thanks to his holy Name.

let the many coasts and islands be glad. ⓖ

all the peoples see his glory. ⓜ

All who serve carved images,

AMP.1:
The LORD reigns, let the earth rejoice;
Let the many islands and coastlands be glad.
AMP.2:
Clouds and thick darkness surround Him [as at Sinai];
Righteousness and justice are the foundation of His throne.
AMP.3:
Fire goes before Him
And burns up His adversaries on all sides.
AMP.4:
His lightnings have illuminated the world;
The earth has seen and trembled.
AMP.5:
The mountains melted like wax at the presence of the LORD,
At the presence of the Lord of the whole earth.
AMP.6:
The heavens declare His righteousness,
And all the peoples see His glory and brilliance.
AMP.7:
Let all those be [deeply] ashamed who serve carved images,
Who boast in idols.
Worship Him, all you gods!
AMP.8:
Zion heard this and was glad,
And the daughters (cities) of Judah rejoiced [in relief]
Because of Your judgments, O LORD.
AMP.9:
For You are the LORD Most High over all the earth;
You are exalted far above all gods.
AMP.10:
You who love the LORD, hate evil;
He protects the souls of His godly ones (believers),
He rescues them from the hand of the wicked.
AMP.11:
Light is sown [like seed] for the righteous and illuminates their path,
And [irrepressible] joy [is spread] for the upright in heart [who delight in His favor and protection].
AMP.12:
Rejoice in the LORD, you righteous ones [those whose moral and spiritual integrity places them in right standing with God],
And praise and give thanks at the remembrance of His holy name.

MSG.1:
God rules: there's something to shout over!
On the double, mainlands and islands—celebrate!
MSG.2:
Bright clouds and storm clouds circle 'round him;
Right and justice anchor his rule.
MSG.3:
Fire blazes out before him,
Flaming high up the craggy mountains.
MSG.4:
His lightnings light up the world;
Earth, wide-eyed, trembles in fear.
MSG.5:
The mountains take one look at God
And melt, melt like wax before earth's Lord.
MSG.6:
The heavens announce that he'll set everything right,
And everyone will see it happen—glorious!
MSG.7:
All who serve handcrafted gods will be sorry—
And they were so proud of their ragamuffin gods!
On your knees, all you gods—worship him!
MSG.8:
And Zion, you listen and take heart!
Daughters of Zion, sing your hearts out:
God has done it all, has set everything right.
MSG.9:
You, God, are High God of the cosmos,
Far, far higher than any of the gods.
MSG.10:
God loves all who hate evil,
And those who love him he keeps safe,
Snatches them from the grip of the wicked.
MSG.11:
Light-seeds are planted in the souls of God's people,
Joy-seeds are planted in good heart-soil.
MSG.12:
So, God's people, shout praise to God,
Give thanks to our Holy God!

NIV.1:
Psalm 97
The Lord reigns, let the earth be glad;
let the distant shores rejoice.
NIV.2:
Clouds and thick darkness surround him;
righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
NIV.3:
Fire goes before him
and consumes his foes on every side.
NIV.4:
His lightning lights up the world;
the earth sees and trembles.
NIV.5:
The mountains melt like wax before the Lord,
before the Lord of all the earth.
NIV.6:
The heavens proclaim his righteousness,
and all the peoples see his glory.
NIV.7:
All who worship images are put to shame,
those who boast in idols—
worship him, all you gods!
NIV.8:
Zion hears and rejoices
and the villages of Judah are glad
because of your judgments, O Lord.
NIV.9:
For you, O Lord, are the Most High over all the earth;
you are exalted far above all gods.
NIV.10:
Let those who love the Lord hate evil,
for he guards the lives of his faithful ones
and delivers them from the hand of the wicked.
NIV.11:
Light is shed upon the righteous
and joy on the upright in heart.
NIV.12:
Rejoice in the Lord, you who are righteous,
and praise his holy name.

NRSVCE.1:
The LORD is king! Let the earth rejoice;
let the many coastlands be glad!
NRSVCE.2:
Clouds and thick darkness are all around him;
righteousness and justice are the foundation of his throne.
NRSVCE.3:
Fire goes before him,
and consumes his adversaries on every side.
NRSVCE.4:
His lightnings light up the world;
the earth sees and trembles.
NRSVCE.5:
The mountains melt like wax before the LORD,
before the Lord of all the earth.
NRSVCE.6:
The heavens proclaim his righteousness;
and all the peoples behold his glory.
NRSVCE.7:
All worshipers of images are put to shame,
those who make their boast in worthless idols;
all gods bow down before him.
NRSVCE.8:
Zion hears and is glad,
and the towns of Judah rejoice,
because of your judgments, O God.
NRSVCE.9:
For you, O LORD, are most high over all the earth;
you are exalted far above all gods.
NRSVCE.10:
The LORD loves those who hate evil;
he guards the lives of his faithful;
he rescues them from the hand of the wicked.
NRSVCE.11:
Light dawns for the righteous,
and joy for the upright in heart.
NRSVCE.12:
Rejoice in the LORD, O you righteous,
and give thanks to his holy name!

NET.1: The LORD reigns! Let the earth be happy! Let the many coastlands rejoice!
NET.2: Dark clouds surround him; equity and justice are the foundation of his throne.
NET.3: Fire goes before him; on every side it burns up his enemies.
NET.4: His lightning bolts light up the world; the earth sees and trembles.
NET.5: The mountains melt like wax before the LORD, before the Lord of the whole earth.
NET.6: The sky declares his justice, and all the nations see his splendor.
NET.7: All who worship idols are ashamed, those who boast about worthless idols. All the gods bow down before him.
NET.8: Zion hears and rejoices, the towns of Judah are happy, because of your judgments, O LORD.
NET.9: For you, O LORD, are the sovereign king over the whole earth; you are elevated high above all gods.
NET.10: You who love the LORD, hate evil! He protects the lives of his faithful followers; he delivers them from the power of the wicked.
NET.11: The godly bask in the light; the morally upright experience joy.
NET.12: You godly ones, rejoice in the LORD! Give thanks to his holy name.
